title: It's YouTube Poop's fifth anniversary today!!
description:
Yeah, yeah, I know, gentlementlemen. I was just getting it out of my system.

No, but seriously "I'D SAY HE'S HOT ON OUR TAIL" was created five years ago today.

GO TEAM!
